title: oSzoukaua's: Infini-Slime
description: Makes slimes smaller the less health they have, and bigger the more health they have!
body:
# Description: This Datapack/mod changes how Slimes work, rather than splitting off into multiple (but smaller) slimes once killed, Slimes will now decrease/increase in size based on their health, a Slime with more health will be larger than one with lower health! Damage and Attack range also scale dynamically with size! Slime ball drops have been increased to account for the removal of Slimes splitting.

![Preview of slime getting hit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hw00LnIg/images/5ce344cac5d17ad36752faec55bba8b312a35614.gif)
## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.
